autoSizeMax.description: The select field will never be smaller than the specified size and never larger than the value of autoSizeMax.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

dontRemapTablesOnCopy.description: A list of tables which should not be remapped to the new element uids if the field holds elements that are copied in the session.

elementBrowserEntryPoints.description: By default, the last selected page is used when opening the element browser. Setting this configuration value changes this behaviour.

filter.description: Define filters for item values. Doesn't work in combination with a wizard.

foreign_table.description: The item-array will be filled with records from the table defined here

hideDeleteIcon.description: Removes the delete icon next to the selector box.

hideMoveIcons.description: Removes the move icons next to the selector box.

hideSuggest.description: Setting this property to true disables the suggest wizard.

localizeReferencesAtParentLocalization.description: Defines whether referenced records should be localized when the current record gets localized. This only applies if references are not stored using MM tables.

maxitems.description: Maximum number of items allowed in the select field

minitems.description: Minimum number of items allowed in the select field

MM.description: This value contains the name of the table in which to store a MM relation. It is used together with foreign_table.

MM_match_fields.description: Array of field => value pairs to both insert and match against when writing/reading MM relations.

MM_opposite_field.description: If you want to make a MM relation editable from the foreign side (bidirectional) of the relation as well, you need to set MM_opposite_field on the foreign side to the field name on the local side.

MM_oppositeUsage.description: In a MM bidirectional relation using match fields the opposite side needs to know about the match fields for certain operations

MM_table_where.description: Additional where clause used when reading MM relations.

multiple.description: Allows the same item more than once in a list.

prepend_tname.description: Will prepend the table name to the stored relations

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

size.description: If set to 1 (default), displays a select drop-down, else a select box of given size.

additionalSearchFields.description: Comma-separated list of fields the suggest wizard should also search in

addWhere.description: Allows to define an additional where clause for the searchquery.

cssClass.description: Add a CSS class to every list item of the result list.

maxItemsInResultList.description: Maximum number of results to display.

maxPathTitleLength.description: Maximum number of characters to display when a path element is too long.

minimumCharacters.description: Minimum number of characters needed to start the search.

orderBy.description: Allows to add an ORDER BY part to the search query.

pidList.description: Limit the search to certain pages (and their sub pages).

pidDepth.description: Expand pidList by this number of levels. Has an effect only if pidList has a value.

renderFunc.description: User function to manipulate the displayed records in the results.

searchCondition.description: Additional WHERE clause (not prepended with AND).

searchWholePhrase.description: Searches for the whole phrase, not only the beginning of the word.
